---
name: create-database-for-website
description: "Use the current website files to design and implement a database schema plus integration plan for this project."
---
Analyze the current website source files and create a database solution that fits the application.

- Inspect existing frontend pages, server code, and data files.
- Propose a database schema or data model appropriate for the site.
- Recommend a storage approach (JSON file, SQLite, MongoDB, etc.) based on the project structure.
- Provide sample schema definitions, seed data, and server integration code.
- Explain how to wire the database into the existing website and backend.
